title: Reduce Defect-Driven Returns in Electronics
action: Enforce pre-shipment QC with suppliers. Target 20% defect reduction.

title: Fix Item Not as Described in Electronics
finding: $106697 total cost CSAT 2.72/5. Product listing accuracy issues.
action: Audit descriptions for top-20 return SKUs. Add 360 images and size guides.

title: Expedite Resolution in Central Region
finding: Central region lowest CSAT 2.52/5 and $17.84 avg cost per return.
action: Add dedicated returns agent. Automate SLA tracking. Target <= 5 days.
estimated_impact: 35% reduction in manual reporting +0.4 CSAT improvement
